steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that the longer a species has been extinct, the less likely a suitable habitat remains, so we need the candidate that has been extinct the longest.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B (saber-toothed cat, extinct 11,000 years ago) gives a specific, far-back date that the other options either lack or cannot match while staying directly supported by the table data.
Choice C describes the woolly mammoth only relative to the saber-toothed cat without the table giving a usable absolute date that the statement requires for this comparison. Choices A and D describe species that died out far more recently (passenger pigeon, Caribbean monk seal in 1952).
That matches choice B — B is correct.
